instruction: Build a contact form with name, email, and message fields. Include a submit button.
relevant_when: Agent creates or modifies any HTML page, React component, Vue component, Svelte component, Angular template, or frontend UI that contains form elements
context: The user asked for a contact form without mentioning accessibility. The agent must proactively include full accessibility support: labels linked to inputs, aria-required on required fields, aria-invalid and aria-describedby for error states, role="alert" on error messages, semantic HTML, and keyboard support.

checklist.name: labels-linked-to-inputs
checklist.rule: Every input, select, and textarea has a visible <label> element with for/id linking (HTML) or htmlFor (React/JSX). Placeholder text alone is not sufficient.

checklist.name: aria-required-on-required-fields
checklist.rule: Required form fields have aria-required="true" in addition to the HTML required attribute

checklist.name: aria-invalid-on-error
checklist.rule: When validation fails, the invalid input has aria-invalid="true" set (can be conditional/dynamic)

checklist.name: aria-describedby-for-errors
checklist.rule: Error messages are linked to their input via aria-describedby pointing to the error element's id
checklist.relevant_when: Agent displays inline validation error messages

checklist.name: role-alert-on-error-messages
checklist.rule: Validation error message elements use role="alert" so screen readers announce them immediately

checklist.name: semantic-form-element
checklist.rule: The form uses a <form> element (not a <div>) with an onSubmit handler

checklist.name: button-for-submit
checklist.rule: The submit action uses a <button type="submit"> element, not a <div> or <span> with an onClick handler
checklist.relevant_when: Agent creates a form submit action

checklist.name: focus-visible-not-removed
checklist.rule: Agent does not remove focus outlines (no outline:none without a visible replacement focus style). If custom focus styles are used, :focus-visible is present.
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes CSS for the form
